basic_details.job_title: GADVASU Recruitment 2026: 49 Vacancies for Junior Engineer, Veterinary Inspector, Driver and Other Posts
basic_details.application_mode: Offline application form; fee payment online
basic_details.job_location: Punjab - Main campus/Outstations/Outside Colleges/Research Stations/KVKs of the University
basic_details.short_information: Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (GADVASU), Ludhiana has invited applications for 49 vacancies under Advertisement No. 01/2026, covering Junior Engineer (Civil & Electrical), Veterinary Inspector, Agriculture Sub-Inspector, Driver, Chowkidar, and Animal Attendant posts. As per Corrigendum-I, the last date to apply offline has been extended to 28.07.2026 up to 4:00 PM.

application_fee.details: Fee is inclusive of GST and must be paid online only. The payment link has been active since 20.06.2026. The downloaded payment receipt must be attached with the application form. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

age_limit.details: Age is reckoned as on 01.01.2026. Minimum age: 18 years. Maximum age for General Category: 37 years.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate application forms with separate fee and enclosures for each post. All academic credentials must be from a recognized Board/University/Institution. All required certificates/documents must have been issued on or before the last date of application submission. Selected candidates for Sr. No. 1 to 5 must execute a bond at the time of joining, as per the terms available on the University website. Probation period for all posts is three years, as per Punjab Government rules. Selected candidates may be posted at the Main campus, Outstations, Outside Colleges/Research Stations/KVKs, and can be deputed for night duty on a rotational basis. Selected candidates must undergo mandatory medical fitness tests and Character and Antecedents verification before joining. Application forms without prescribed fee, documents, photographs or signatures will be treated as incomplete and rejected. No correction or addition of documents will be entertained after the last date of submission. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in any examination, test or document verification. The University reserves the right to increase, decrease or withdraw any post at any stage, as reiterated in Corrigendum-I.

selection_process: What is confirmed from the official source: all candidates must clear a qualifying Punjabi language test equivalent to Matriculation standard with a minimum of 50% marks
in addition to any competitive examination/proficiency/physical test applicable to the post. Failure to secure 50% marks in the Punjabi language test disqualifies the candidate from the next stage.
how_to_apply: Download the application form from the official website: www.gadvasu.in.
Fill in all personal, educational and other required details correctly, including your own mobile number and email ID.
Pay the application fee online through the payment link on the website.
Attach the downloaded payment receipt with the application form.
Enclose self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates, properly page-numbered, indexed and tagged.
Keep a copy of the submitted application form for your own reference.

Send the duly filled hard copy of the application form, along with fee receipt and enclosures, by post/physical mode only to: The Registrar, Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University, Near Verka Milk Plant, Ferozepur Road, Ludhiana-141012, so as to reach on or before 28.07.2026 up to 4:00 PM.
In-service candidates must send an advance copy by the same last date (28.07.2026), with the proper-channel copy reaching the Registrar's office by 13.08.2026.

content_sections.heading: GADVASU Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age is reckoned as on 01.01.2026. Minimum age: 18 years. Maximum age for General Category: 37 years.

rows.age_relaxation: As per length of military service; total age after relaxation not to exceed 3 years over the upper age limit

rows.category: Widows, divorcees and certain categories of married women (Punjab Govt. instructions)
Regular/contractual in-service candidates in Government/Semi-Government Departments/State Universities/Government Boards and Corporations
rows.age_relaxation: Relaxed up to 45 years (applications must be through proper channel)

content_sections.heading: GADVASU Recruitment 2026 Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Both documents state that complete eligibility criteria are available on the official website: www.gadvasu.in . Please share the detailed notification PDF from the official site if you'd like this section completed with verified, post-wise qualification data. What is confirmed from the official source: all candidates must have passed Matriculation examination in Punjabi language from the Punjab School Education Board or an equivalent recognized examination, on or before the last date of application submission.

content_sections.heading: GADVASU Recruitment 2026 Exam Pattern & Selection Process
content_sections.text: What is confirmed from the official source: all candidates must clear a qualifying Punjabi language test equivalent to Matriculation standard with a minimum of 50% marks , in addition to any competitive examination/proficiency/physical test applicable to the post. Failure to secure 50% marks in the Punjabi language test disqualifies the candidate from the next stage.

content_sections.heading: GADVASU Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee is inclusive of GST and must be paid online only. The payment link has been active since 20.06.2026. The downloaded payment receipt must be attached with the application form. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

content_sections.heading: GADVASU Recruitment 2026 Reservation Policy
content_sections.text: Reservation benefits are available only to residents of Punjab, as per Punjab Government rules. Category certificates must be as per Punjab Government instructions. A recent Domicile/Residence Certificate (not older than 5 years as on the last date of application) is mandatory for all candidates claiming reservation. Original category certificates must be produced during document verification, failing which the claimed category will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for GADVASU Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Duly filled application form (downloaded from the official website) Self-attested photocopies of all certificates relating to qualification, marks, experience and category (page-numbered, indexed and tagged) Downloaded fee payment receipt Recent Domicile/Residence Certificate (not older than 5 years), where claiming reservation Three self-addressed envelopes (9”x4”) Recent photograph and signature

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for GADVASU Recruitment 2026 (Offline)
content_sections.text: Download the application form from the official website: www.gadvasu.in. Fill in all personal, educational and other required details correctly, including your own mobile number and email ID. Pay the application fee online through the payment link on the website. Attach the downloaded payment receipt with the application form. Enclose self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates, properly page-numbered, indexed and tagged. Enclose three self-addressed envelopes (9”x4”). Keep a copy of the submitted application form for your own reference. Send the duly filled hard copy of the application form, along with fee receipt and enclosures, by post/physical mode only to: The Registrar, Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University, Near Verka Milk Plant, Ferozepur Road, Ludhiana-141012 , so as to reach on or before 28.07.2026 up to 4:00 PM . In-service candidates must send an advance copy by the same last date (28.07.2026), with the proper-channel copy reaching the Registrar's office by 13.08.2026 .

content_sections.heading: Other Important Eligibility Conditions
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate application forms with separate fee and enclosures for each post. All academic credentials must be from a recognized Board/University/Institution. All required certificates/documents must have been issued on or before the last date of application submission. Selected candidates for Sr. No. 1 to 5 must execute a bond at the time of joining, as per the terms available on the University website. Probation period for all posts is three years, as per Punjab Government rules. Selected candidates may be posted at the Main campus, Outstations, Outside Colleges/Research Stations/KVKs, and can be deputed for night duty on a rotational basis. Selected candidates must undergo mandatory medical fitness tests and Character and Antecedents verification before joining. Application forms without prescribed fee, documents, photographs or signatures will be treated as incomplete and rejected. No correction or addition of documents will be entertained after the last date of submission. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in any examination, test or document verification. The University reserves the right to increase, decrease or withdraw any post at any stage, as reiterated in Corrigendum-I.

faq.question: Q1. How many total vacancies are there in GADVASU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per Corrigendum-I, a total of 49 vacancies have been notified: Junior Engineer (Civil) – 1, Junior Engineer (Electrical) – 1, Veterinary Inspector – 5, Agriculture Sub-Inspector – 2, Driver – 10, Chowkidar – 10, and Animal Attendant – 20.

faq.question: Q2. What is the extended last date to apply for GADVASU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the complete application has been extended to 28.07.2026 up to 4:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. Where should the GADVASU application form be sent?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent to The Registrar, Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University, Near Verka Milk Plant, Ferozepur Road, Ludhiana-141012, by post/physical mode only.

faq.question: Q4. Is the GADVASU application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application form must be submitted offline (through post/physical mode). Only the application fee is paid online.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for GADVASU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Sr. No. 1 to 5 posts, the fee is Rs. 590/- for SC/PwD candidates and Rs. 1,180/- for others. For Sr. No. 6 to 7 posts, it is Rs. 295/- for SC/PwD candidates and Rs. 590/- for others.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for GADVASU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old and, for General Category, not above 37 years as on 01.01.2026, with relaxations as per Punjab Government rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Junior Engineer at GADVASU?
faq.answer: The Junior Engineer (Civil and Electrical) posts carry a pay scale of Rs. 35,400 (Level-6).

faq.question: Q8. Is Punjabi language knowledge mandatory for GADVASU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must have passed Matriculation in Punjabi and must also clear a qualifying Punjabi language test with a minimum of 50% marks.

faq.question: Q9. What is the last date for in-service candidates applying through proper channel?
faq.answer: The application through proper channel for in-service candidates must reach the Registrar's office by 13.08.2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates download the GADVASU Recruitment 2026 application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official University website, www.gadvasu.in.
